title: Yo Protocol's Slippage Bomb
relevance_summary: Slippage bomb executed via Odos Router with broken parameters, resulting in massive liquidity provider rewards.

prevention.rule: Block any tx that uses Odos Router with stkGHO to USDC path and shows signs of abnormal routing via executePath parameters.
prevention.trigger: ODOS_ROUTER_CALL -> stkGHO to USDC with executePath parameters indicating fragmented or unusual routing

monitoring_rules: Block any tx using Odos Router with stkGHO to USDC path and showing signs of abnormal routing via executePath parameters
summary: A single transaction from YO Protocol's vault operator routed $3.71 million through Odos Router with broken parameters, resulting in massive rewards for liquidity providers. A guard could have blocked this by monitoring for abnormal routing via executePath parameters.
